title: Discrete mass is the finite total over the grid range

source.notes: Generated from checked Lean ground truth; source repository withheld during public release.

informal.statement: The discrete mass functional is definitionally the totalOn finite sum.
assumptions: all scalar parameters are real numbers
u is a real-valued grid state on natural-number indices
n and i are natural-number grid or range indices as used in the theorem statement
the KdV scaffold definitions are those in LeanNumerics.FiniteDifference.Kdv
informal.expected_conclusion: The discreteMass definition agrees with totalOn.

declarations.name: discreteMass_eq_totalOn
declarations.statement: theorem discreteMass_eq_totalOn (u : Nat -> Real) (n : Nat) : discreteMass u n = totalOn u n
